For more information, follow the category link. <noinclude> [[Category:Redirects from other capitalisations| ]] [[Category:Redirect templates|Capitalisation]] [[Category:Unprintworthy redirects| ]] [[Category:Disambiguation and redirection templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] </noinclude> <includeonly> [[Category:Redirects from other capitalisations]] [[Category:Unprintworthy redirects]] </includeonly>

This is a redirect from a title with another method of capitalisation. It is available as a family also in different '''capitalizations''', and spellings of '''capitialisations'''. {{i}}It leads to the title in accordance with the Wikipedia naming conventions for capitalisation, and can help writing, searching, and international language issues. Apply one of the below templates to redirects created for this purpose. Spelling variants should use one of Pages linking to any of these redirects may be updated to link directly to the target page. However, do not replace these redirected links with a piped link unless the page is updated for another reason. For more information, follow the category link. ==Other permutations== *Main: {{lts|R from other capitalization}}{{I}}The others below all redirect to R from other capitalization. Many contain the same code in noinclude blocks and this table is being added to all. *{{lts|R from capitalization}} — {{i}}{{lts|R from other capitalization}} *{{lts|R from capitalisation}} — {{i}}{{lts|R from other capitalisation}} *{{lts|R from Capitalization}} — {{i}}{{lts|R from other Capitalization}} *{{lts|R from Capitalisation}} — {{i}}{{lts|R from other Capitalisation}}
  [[Category:Redirects from other capitalisations| ]] [[Category:Redirect templates|Capitalisation]] [[Category:Unprintworthy redirects| ]] [[Category:Disambiguation and redirection templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:Redirects from other capitalisations]] [[Category:Unprintworthy redirects]]

revision.text:
----
This is a redirect from a title with another method of capitalisation. It leads to the title in accordance with the Wikipedia naming conventions for capitalisation, and can help writing, searching, and international language issues. Apply one of the below templates to redirects created for this purpose. Other variants should use one of the other [[Wikipedia:Template messages/Redirect pages|redirect templates]] such as [[Template:R from alternative spelling|from alternative spelling]] or [[Template:R from alternative name|from alternative name]]. Pages linking to any of these redirects may be updated to link directly to the target page. However, do not replace these redirected links with a piped link unless the page is updated for another reason. For more information, follow the category link {{CAT|Redirects from other capitalisations}}. *This template is available as a family also in different '''capitalizations''', and spellings of '''capitialisations'''. *See also: [[Wikipedia:Template messages/Redirect pages]] ==Other permutations== *Main: [[Template:R from other capitalization]] The others below all redirect or duplicate the essentials of {{Lts|R from other capitalization}}. revision.comment: Revert to revision 107786634 dated 2007-02-13 10:01:53 by Patrick using [[:en:Wikipedia:Tools/Navigation_popups|popups]]
revision.text:
----
This is a redirect from a title with another method of capitalisation. It leads to the title in accordance with the Wikipedia naming conventions for capitalisation, and can help writing, searching, and international language issues. Apply one of the below templates to redirects created for this purpose. Other variants should use one of the other [[Wikipedia:Template messages/Redirect pages|redirect templates]] such as [[Template:R from alternative spelling|from alternative spelling]] or [[Template:R from alternative name|from alternative name]]. Pages linking to any of these redirects may be updated to link directly to the target page. However, do not replace these redirected links with a piped link unless the page is updated for another reason.
